prompt:
Prompt:
A tiny, charismatic car salesman named Tiny Troy, about 12 inches tall, with warm brown skin, expressive brown eyes, a neatly groomed black beard, wearing a brown fedora, black polo shirt, khaki pants, and sneakers, stands proudly on the hood of a shiny blue SUV inside a bright dealership showroom. A curious customer looks down at him with crossed arms and says, "I don't know..." Tiny Troy grins confidently, points toward the driver's seat, and says, "Give me sixty seconds... I'll make this your favorite test drive." He snaps his fingers, the SUV sparkles, the headlights flash once, upbeat music kicks in, and the customer laughs before opening the driver's door. Tiny Troy throws both hands in the air and shouts, "Now we're talking!" Smooth cinematic camera movement, expressive facial animation, realistic lighting, polished reflections, playful comedy, family-friendly, no text, no logos, no watermarks.
Voice Lines
Customer:
"I don't know..."
Tiny Troy:
"Give me sixty seconds... I'll make this your favorite test drive."
(Customer smiles and opens the door.)
Tiny Troy:
"Now we're talking!" 🚗✨

Tiny Troy, a charming miniature car salesman with warm brown skin, a neatly trimmed black beard, expressive brown eyes, and a brown fedora, stands on the hood of a shiny red SUV in a bright, modern dealership showroom. He smiles confidently at the camera and says, "Let's get you rolling!" He snaps his fingers, and colorful approval stamps and golden sparkles swirl around the SUV without covering it. The headlights flash once, the vehicle gleams, and Tiny Troy points proudly toward the driver's seat before giving a thumbs-up. Smooth cinematic camera movement, high-end 3D animation, realistic reflections, warm sunlight through the showroom windows, polished floors, playful energy, family-friendly, no text on screen, no logos, no watermarks.

Tiny Troy looks at the camera, smiles, and says, “Need a better ride? I got you.” He points toward a shiny red SUV as the headlights flash once. The camera slowly moves closer. Bright modern showroom, polished 3D animation, warm lighting, smooth natural movement, consistent character appearance, family-friendly.

Tiny Troy, a cheerful miniature car salesman wearing a brown fedora and black polo, pops up from inside a glowing open box in a bright modern car showroom. He looks at the camera, gives a thumbs-up, and says, “Let’s make it happen!” Smooth cinematic camera movement, playful polished 3D animation, warm lighting, realistic reflections, family-friendly.
